coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-100 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 11:03 at 65%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: where excitement goes to retire. 11:03 of controlled boredom.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First block at 95%. This is race pace. If you can't hold this, you can't race. Simple.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First threshold block. 95-95% FTP. Settle in — don't overcook the start.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Starting threshold work. This is the bread and butter of cycling fitness. Embrace it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting threshold work. Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain.' (It doesn't, but it should.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: First threshold block. 11:03 at 95-95%. Smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/5. 5:12 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/1. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:12. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 33% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/5. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 33% into session. 55%, 85-100 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 41% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 27 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 27 minutes in. 95% at 85-100 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 41% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 2 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 41% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 41% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 95%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 5:12. Then 22min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-100 rpm, 55-55% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/5. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 4/5. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/5. Power: 55-55%, Cadence: 85-100 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last threshold block. 95% FTP. One more step toward crushing your old FTP. Worth it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last block. 95-95% FTP, 85-100 rpm. After this: 11min cooldown.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last threshold block. Then 11min easy. Make this one count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting threshold work. Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain.' (It doesn't, but it should.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last threshold interval. 95% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 54 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 43min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 83% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 54 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
